title: caladenia ensigera
intro: Caladenia ensigera, also known as the ensigma spider orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Caladenia ensigera include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Caladenia ensigera are typically made into teas or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
